name: CFSC Checks Cashed Timmerman Plaza
description_short: CFSC Checks Cashed Timmerman Plaza offers check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, and prepaid debit cards without requiring a bank account. Located in Milwaukee, they provide quick financial services with no credit checks.
description_long:
Community Financial Services Corporation (CFSC) operates a check-cashing and money services location at 10400 W Silver Spring Drive in Milwaukee's Timmerman Plaza neighborhood. The company provides accessible financial services to unbanked and underbanked consumers who need alternatives to traditional banking. CFSC has multiple locations across Milwaukee, with this location being one of several franchises under the same brand. The business model focuses on convenience and speed for customers without traditional bank accounts or those seeking faster alternatives to bank processing times.

CFSC Timmerman Plaza offers a comprehensive suite of financial services beyond basic check cashing. These include money orders, electronic bill pay, money transfers, prepaid debit cards (Yes! Debit Account), ATM access, foreign currency exchange (80+ countries), tax refund check cashing, transit/MetroCard purchases, and phone resale through EcoATM kiosks. They also offer business check cashing for customers with checks made out to their businesses. Money transfer services are facilitated through Western Union partnerships.

The location distinguishes itself through no-credit-check requirements for prepaid debit cards, acceptance of various government-issued photo IDs for check cashing, and transparent service delivery without monthly fees. The company emphasizes speed of service—checks cash immediately without waiting for funds to clear as required by banks. Multiple service offerings under one roof provide convenience compared to visiting separate vendors. The business is actively hiring, suggesting operational stability and growth.

However, potential customers should note that the website contains a clear data error: Monday hours list "9:00 am to 6:00 am," which appears to be a typo and should be verified by calling (414) 875-6618 before visiting. Check-cashing services typically charge fees that vary by check type and amount, though specific fee schedules are not disclosed on the website. This remains a for-profit alternative financial services provider, not a non-profit or community development financial institution.
address: 10400 W Silver Spring Dr, Milwaukee, WI 53225

company_info.headquarters: 10400 W Silver Spring Dr, Milwaukee, WI 53225

pros: No bank account required to cash checks—only photo ID and personal information needed
Immediate cash access with no waiting period for check funds to clear
No monthly fees unlike traditional bank accounts
No credit check required for prepaid debit card (Yes! Debit Account) application
Foreign currency exchange for 80+ countries available at this location
Multiple services consolidated at one location: check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, tax refunds
Accepts various government-issued photo IDs and some alternative ID types for check cashing
cons: Website contains scheduling error (Monday hours listed as 9:00 am to 6:00 am) creating confusion about actual operating hours
Specific check-cashing fees and service charges are not disclosed on the website, requiring customers to call or visit in person
Limited hours compared to some other Milwaukee CFSC locations (closes at 6:00 pm vs. 8:00-10:00 pm at other branches)
For-profit business model means fees are charged for services, making this more expensive than traditional bank accounts long-term
Transit/MetroCard and tax refund services availability is location-dependent and not explicitly confirmed for this specific location
best_for: Unbanked individuals without access to traditional bank accounts
Consumers who need immediate check cashing without waiting for bank processing (typically 3-5 business days)
Small business owners with business checks who want same-day cash without commercial banking requirements
Customers needing international money transfers or foreign currency exchange
diagnosis: CFSC Timmerman Plaza is best for unbanked Milwaukee residents and small business owners who need fast check cashing without bank accounts or traditional banking requirements. The main caveat is that check-cashing and related services carry fees that aren't transparently listed on their website, and the website's Monday hours contain a data error that should be verified by calling (414) 875-6618 before visiting.
services: Transit/MetroCard and OMNY transit card purchases
